name: VPN connectivity troubleshooting
description: Safe-guidance case. Employee starts with a general VPN problem and then provides client, OS, error, and already-tried steps. The agent should use internal tools and provide grounded troubleshooting guidance rather than escalating immediately.
messages: I'm remote and I can't get into internal tools because VPN keeps failing.
Cisco AnyConnect on macOS. It says connection timed out. I already restarted the app and I'm on home WiFi.
